name: conservation-overview
title: Conservation Insight — The Story So Far
subtitle: a narrative rollup of adoption, mix, cost-share ROI & provider agreement
description: A conservation-insight narrative showcase — a richtext walkthrough tying together the other six Conservation examples, with headline rollups for overall adoption, the multi-year practice mix, cost-share return, and provider agreement.

dataAccesses.name: OverviewKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) FROM v_practice_adoption) AS adoption_pct, (SELECT SUM(cost_share_usd) FROM v_cost_share_roi) AS cost_share_total, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) FROM v_provider_agreement) AS agreement_pct, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(net_shift_pct),1) FROM v_practice_mix_by_year) AS net_shift_pct

dataAccesses.name: PracticeMixHeadline
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT year, ROUND(AVG(covercrop_pct),1) AS covercrop_pct, ROUND(AVG(notill_pct),1) AS notill_pct FROM v_practice_mix_by_year GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: OverallAdoption
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS adoption_pct FROM v_practice_adoption

dataAccesses.name: AcresByPractice
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, SUM(acres) AS acres FROM v_practice_adoption GROUP BY 1

dataAccesses.name: ReturnScoreByPractice
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, ROUND(AVG(pct) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_share_usd)/100000,0),1) AS return_score FROM v_cost_share_roi GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: OverallAgreement
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS agreement_pct FROM v_provider_agreement

kpis.label: Overall Adoption
kpis.info: Common-estimate adoption rate across every tracked practice and provider — the same headline as the Practice Adoption Scorecard.

kpis.label: Total Cost-Share Paid
kpis.info: Total cost-share dollars disbursed across the program — see Program Cost-Share ROI for the full efficiency picture.

kpis.label: Provider Agreement
kpis.info: How closely the independent providers' estimates track each other — see Provider Agreement Over Time for the year-by-year spread.

kpis.label: Net Shift to Conservation Practices
kpis.info: Net percentage-point move toward cover crops and reduced tillage, away from conventional, since the baseline year — see Year-over-Year Practice Switching for the full trend.

panels.title: The Story So Far
panels.sub: a guided rollup of the whole Conservation set

opts.content:
## Conservation Insight — The Story So Far
Seven showcases, one program: adoption, practice mix, watershed scale, cost-share ROI, provider agreement, county-level outliers, and year-over-year switching. This dashboard pulls the headline number from each thread into a single read.

- **Adoption** is climbing across the tracked acreage — see the *Practice Adoption Scorecard* for the practice × provider breakdown
- **Mix** — the trend below shows cover crops and no-till both gaining share; *Year-over-Year Practice Switching* has the full stacked-area and rank story
- **Scale** — the same signal holds down to the watershed and county level, in *Watershed-Scale Adoption* and *County-Level Outlier Detection*
- **Cost** — the Return Score below ranks practices by adoption bought per cost-share dollar; *Program Cost-Share ROI* has the full spend-vs-adoption picture
- **Confidence** — provider agreement is holding steady; *Provider Agreement Over Time* has the year-by-year spread

Open any of the six linked showcases from the Examples ▾ gallery for its own filter bar and detail.

panels.title: Practice Mix Trend
panels.sub: cover crops & no-till, year over year
panels.info: The two leading conservation practices' share of acreage over time — the headline behind the Net Shift KPI above.

panels.title: Overall Adoption
panels.info: Blended adoption rate across every practice and provider.

panels.title: Enrolled Acres by Practice
panels.info: Where enrolled acreage sits across the four tracked practices.

panels.title: Return Score by Practice
panels.info: Adoption points achieved per $100K of cost-share spend, ranked by practice.

panels.title: Provider Agreement
panels.info: How closely the independent providers' estimates track each other, blended across years.
